field_of_view_deg: 108 horizontal / 58 vertical / 125 diagonal (wide); 37 horizontal / 20 vertical / 43 diagonal (zoom)
features: 1080p (1920x1080) outdoor camera with 3x powered/motorized optical zoom, 30 FPS, H.264
no baseline IR range figure given in the official datasheet -- only "Integrated High-Power Infrared LEDs" and "Enhanced Low-Light Performance" described, no meter distance confirmed
legacy/vintage product (2018-era UniFi Video/Protect G3 generation)

home_assistant.notes: Native UniFi Protect integration. Requires UniFi Protect console.

blue_iris.notes: Use Generic/RTSP profile with RTSPS URL from UniFi Protect. Requires Protect RTSP stream enabled per camera.
